stemHtml:
Given the following data for the pre-flight calculations, determine the Contingency Fuel for a Commercial Air Transport flight with a Jet aeroplane. Assume the Basic Fuel Scheme WITHOUT variations applies.

Trip Fuel: 3420 kg
Alternate Fuel: 968 kg
Fuel flow at holding speed: 2376 kg/h
Extra Fuel: 0 kg
Discretionary Fuel: 0 kg
